text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno, thanks for before. I couldn't
have figured out that classical lit
problem without you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Truly? It was my honor to be of service.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we've got a quiz tomorrow, so I was
wondering… Would you help me study again?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is no trouble at all. I will aid you
to the best of my abilities.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks… You know, you've been helping me
a lot. I'd like to show my thanks somehow.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: To me? Please, that won't be necessary…

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No, wait — there is one thing I'd like to ask of you. Would you be willing to do a bit of running practice with me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Running practice? Sure, but is that
really all you want?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, absolutely! An opportunity to run with
you is a precious thing — just the thought
of it rouses my spirit!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm excited to run with you too now.
All right, let's go get changed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Wait… shouldn't we take care of your studies
for the quiz first…?
